conflict_name: World War II major urban battles - Eastern Europe
aliases: Budapest, Breslau, Königsberg, and Belgrade urban battles
family_summary: Late-war Eastern European urban battle episodes fought in or around major cities between October 1944 and May 1945. This bundle treats each city battle as a separate episode because geography, timing, force composition, evacuation patterns, and source quality differ materially.
notes: Warsaw excluded per prompt. Denominators are city-level or siege-cordon level, not national.
